description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy, and a global before_script that sources the Cargo environment, updates rustup, and initializes git submodules. Add a beast_deploy job in the deploy stage that runs "rustup default stable", "rustc --version && cargo --version", creates a results directory, runs "cargo clean", exports empty PLATFORM, DEVICE, and MAX_ITERATIONS, executes "cd ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts && ./experiment && cd ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}", and publishes the paths "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/results/ubench_rust_*" and "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ubench_rust_*" as an artifact named "beast"; it runs only on the master branch, must be triggered manually, and is tagged with "beast" and "rust". Add fusion_cpu_nightly, fusion_cpu_stable, and fusion_cpu_test jobs in the build and test stages respectively, each running "rustc --version && cargo --version", switching to nightly or stable toolchain, cleaning with "cargo clean", exporting "PLATFORM=2 DEVICE=0 MAX_ITERATIONS=1" (and for the test job also "RUST_TEST_THREADS=1" before "cargo test --verbose"), and building or testing with "cargo build -v --release"; they use the tags "fusion" and "rust". Add analogous fusion_gpu_nightly, fusion_gpu_stable, and fusion_gpu_test jobs with "PLATFORM=1" for GPU, and a fusion_deploy job similar to beast_deploy but with artifact name "fusion_" and manual trigger on master. Add odroid_cpu_nightly, odroid_cpu_stable, odroid_cpu_test, odroid_gpu_nightly, odroid_gpu_stable, and odroid_gpu_test jobs following the same pattern with appropriate PLATFORM values (1 for CPU, 0 for GPU) and limited to the master branch, plus an odroid_deploy job mirroring the other deploy jobs with artifact name "odroid_" and manual trigger. Ensure all jobs are tagged appropriately (cpu, gpu, nightly, stable, test, deploy, build) and use the rust toolchain throughout.
